name: .Decluster & .Decluster Zero
short_description: The vertical scrolling shooter game '.Decluster' and its sequel '.Decluster Zero' are now available in one package.
detailed_description:
The vertical scrolling shooter game '.Decluster', originally released for mobile, and its sequel '.Decluster Zero' are now available in one package.


Features of '.Decluster'
- Simple 2D shooting game in an arcade style
- "Homing Laser" that combines offense and defense by erasing enemy bullets while attacking


Features of '.Decluster Zero'
- Further evolved homing laser system
- "Capture System" that slows down enemy bullets and turns them into counter lasers
- "Charge System" that quickly recovers the gauge


Additional Features
- Compatible with controller, mouse + keyboard, and keyboard operation
- Local replay function
- Online rankings
- Support for vertical screen play


About Vertical Screen Play
To play in vertical mode, please rotate the screen in the Windows display settings and set your monitor in a vertical position. Alternatively, you can set the screen mode to windowed in the game's video settings and resize the window like any other application.

Note: Some displays may be hidden or simplified in vertical screen mode.
